creator: mat@FreeBSD.org
text:
Mmmm, that is because make config is ran within the host so that it does not have to setup a jail.

As a side note, you do not need to edit the port's Makefile, all you need is edit the /usr/local/etc/poudriere.d/<name-of-jail>-make.conf and add a line with

<options_name>_SET= NEON VFP

the options_name for one port can be found using make -V OPTIONS_NAME in its directory.  For multimedia/ffmpeg, it is multimedia_ffmpeg.
